Finally he had enough, and set about his greatest science experiment yet. It was a simple idea (in theory); a potion that would enhance his masculine features. A sharpened jaw, more defined muscles, a deeper voice, increased height, and everything else to turn him into a hunk.

However, his potion would end up doing the exact opposite. Before he realized what he'd done wrong, the effects began kicking in. Rather than the abs, jawline, and height he dreamed for he instead found himself the owner of hefty breasts, wide hips, juicy thighs, and a brand-new vagina.
